title: Display new job fields in JobDetailModal and job cards
keyConstraints: No inline styles — CSS Modules only. No layout regressions on existing fields.
description: Update JobDetailModal and JobCard to display the new fields added in task-02: jobType badge, services list, customer info, pickup address, and scheduling mode.
acceptanceCriteria: JobDetailModal shows jobType as a styled badge, services as comma-separated text, customer name + phone (if present), pickup address block (if pickupStreet present), scheduling as human-readable text
Scheduling display logic: scheduledStart present → Finnish datetime format; no scheduledStart but schedulingNote → show schedulingNote; neither → show 'Aika sopimatta'
Customer section in JobDetailModal only rendered when job.customer relation is present
JobCard shows jobType badge alongside existing status badge
JobCard shows customer name as secondary line if present
npx tsc --noEmit passes with no errors
implementationNotes: JobType badge colors (CSS classes): DELIVERY=teal, PICKUP=orange, DELIVERY_AND_PICKUP=purple, INSTALLATION=indigo, SERVICE=pink, COMBINED=gray
Reuse existing badge CSS pattern from status badges
customer data comes from job.customer relation — type as optional in Job interface
